summary: Label-Designer V2 Testing Complete - All features verified: Tab navigation, WYSIWYG canvas, Printer Settings dialog with 3 tabs (WiFi, Bluetooth, Browser), IP 192.168.118.1 prefilled, connection test API working, template save/load functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed API field mismatch: TestPrintRequest model now accepts both 'ip_address' and 'printer_ip' fields for backward compatibility
All 3 print methods (WiFi/Netzwerk, Bluetooth, Browser) are correctly implemented and accessible via tabs
IP address 192.168.118.1 is correctly prefilled in the settings dialog
Connection test button works - returns 'offline' status as expected (printer not reachable from server)
WYSIWYG canvas properly renders QR-Code, Barcode, Asset-ID and other elements
Template save/load functionality working with existing templates (123, TSRID Tablets, Standard Label)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Label-Designer V2 is fully functional. Access via Admin Portal -> Label-Designer tab. All printer settings APIs work. Fixed API field naming issue - both ip_address and printer_ip are now accepted.

label_designer_v2_tab_navigation.details: Tab visible in Admin Portal navigation, correctly loads LabelDesignerV2 component

connection_test_button.details: Button works, returns 'offline' status (expected - printer not reachable from server)

POST /api/label-printer/test-connection.response: Accepts both ip_address and printer_ip fields, returns connection status

GET /api/label-printer/status.response: Returns printer configuration and label size

GET /api/label-printer/preview/{asset_id.response: Returns PNG image of label preview

bug_fix_applied.issue: API field name mismatch - frontend sent 'ip_address' but backend expected 'printer_ip'
bug_fix_applied.fix: Updated TestPrintRequest model to accept both field names using Optional fields and property methods
